title: Module 5.1: European Union Directives
subtitle: Navigate EU Laser Safety Regulations & Country Classifications
description: Master EU laser safety directives including 2006/25/EC, understand the Status A-F country classification system, and learn compliance requirements for laser displays across EU member states. Features interactive country status maps and directive hierarchy visualizations.
learning_objectives: Navigate the EU Status A-F country classification system for laser displays
Understand the hierarchy from EU Directive 2006/25/EC to EN 60825 to national implementations
Identify specific requirements for Status A countries (permits, inspections, MPE limits)
Compare regulatory approaches across EU member states
Apply EU compliance procedures for touring laser shows
Recognize when CE marking and additional national certifications are required

badge.name: EU Regulatory Navigator
badge.description: Mastered EU laser safety directives and country classification system

research_alignment.adult_learning: Scenario-based learning with real country examples
research_alignment.retention_strategy: Spaced exposure to country-specific requirements with comparison exercises
